title: mikania goyazensis
intro: Mikania goyazensis, also known as Goyaz milkweed or Mikania, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Mikania goyazensis include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory function, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as asthma and bronchitis. Mikania goyazensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues.
